transcript: I haven't the foggiest. I don't know what the hell you're talking,.. I'm sorry, I don't know what you're talking about, as far as a lesbian magnet.
Are you pulling my leg, or... what's... what's going on here?
I don't know what you're talking about when you use that terminology, as far as magnets are concerned.
What is a hernia lesbian? What is that?
We have over five million magnets in house. If you could describe exactly what that is--
--what a lesbian magnet is, I'd be more than happy to accommodate you. At this point, you're wasting my time.
